body:
APPROVE
Implementation is complete and tightly scoped to the AC. Hub routes are gated on `EnableHubMode`, peer policy is enforced via a federation-specific trust gate, identity-aware registration distinguishes idempotent re-registers from 409 conflicts, and version handshake is factored into a clean `federation.Handshake` with stable reason codes. Test coverage exercises every AC path through the real HTTP handler.
